name: perseus
display_name: Perseus — Live Context Engine for Claude
description: Live workspace context engine for Claude. Resolves project files, git state, services, and memory into ready-to-use context before every turn. Local-first, MCP-native.
long_description:
Perseus eliminates cold-start orientation for Claude. It is a compile-before-context engine that resolves directives (@file, @git, @memory, @services, @search) into a ready context block injected before every Claude session.

- **Zero orientation** — Claude knows your project state immediately, no explaining
- **MCP-native** — works as an MCP server with 33 tools for context resolution
- **Local-first** — all resolution happens on your filesystem, no data leaves your machine
- **Multi-assistant** — works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Hermes Agent, and any MCP host
- **Pairs with Perseus Vault** — persistent cross-session memory when combined with Perseus Vault's 55+ MCP-tool memory backend

Install: `pip install perseus-ctx && cd your-project && perseus quickstart`
